title: Idhu Vazhvukkum Lyrics Pandigai
stanzas:
Idhu vazhvukkum
saavukkum nadakkura sanda.
inge kannimaikkum
nerathula thundaagum thala.

kaniraththam sindhum neram
mavane unna pudichu
kaiyya kaala adichu udachu
moonja kilichu renda pichchi

idhu uyirukkum nizhalukkum
naduvula oru chinna kadha

cant touch me
am number one
am number  one
ganster in town

you cant reach me
am top of the game
am top of the game
...*** game.

ooo never been
never seen anything
like me.
never been anywhere
like this.

dai engirundhu
vandhadaa nee.
aanaa pogum podhu
ettu kaalu paadaithaan de

roatu oram picha poattu
soaru podura naaidaa nee
enga bow bow sollu
bow bow ..
vaadaa modhi paaru

unakkum enakkum
enna paga machchaan
aanaa unnoda thalaiyla
panam vachchaa
adippen unna
midhippen unna
ezhumbil koattai
katti naan nippendaa

poda thookki eri
summa poratti adi
andha ezhumba muri
avan kadhaiya mudi

adraa. unna kaetka yaaru
nee thaarumaaru
un aattam kooru
un edhiri
thookidu avana eguri
kurichidu idhu un thogudhi

ooo never been
never seen
anything like me.
never been
anywhere like this.

seo.title: Idhu Vazhvukkum Lyrics Pandigai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Idhu Vazhvukkum conveys themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the lively spirit of the movie Pandigai.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Pandigai, this song is featured during a festive scene, enhancing the celebratory mood of the characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by MC Vicky and Sricharan, with music composed by Vikram RH.

When was the song released?

Idhu Vazhvukkum was released on February 28, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Idhu Vazhvukkum from Pandigai is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the essence of celebration and joy. It features a catchy rhythm and engaging lyrics that invite listeners to dance and enjoy the moment. The collaboration between MC Vicky and Sricharan brings a unique energy that resonates with the festive spirit of the movie. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Vazhvukkum from Pandigai is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of MC Vicky and Sricharan, this song is sure to get everyone on their feet. The infectious beats crafted by Vikram RH make it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: This is a fight happening between life and death. Here, it will become a challenge for the eyes.
In the moment of tears, I hold you tightly, hitting the time with my hands, breaking the silence, and going crazy.
This is a small story between life and shadow.
Can't touch me, I am number one, the number one gangster in town.
You can't reach me, I am at the top of the game, I am at the top of the game ...*** game.
Oh, I've never been, never seen anything like me. I've never been anywhere like this.
Hey, where did you come from? But when you leave, you will have to sing with your feet.
In this forest, the sound of the flute is heard, in this festival, the blood is flowing.
On the side of the road, I am putting on a show, you dog, tell me where your bow is, bow ... look at the way.
What is the relationship between you and me, brother? But if you put money on your head, I will crush you, I will hit you, I will tie you up in your own trap.
Get lost, just rise up and hit, that story of his is over.
Hey, who will ask you? Your dance is a challenge, he will take you down, this is your fate.
In the burning fire, a festival is happening.
Oh, I've never been, never seen anything like me. I've never been anywhere like this.
